$description: Solidigm voice tokens. Machine-readable encoding of the five brand voice traits and their guardrails. Consumed by validate_brand_output and get_brand_context.

optimistic.$value: upbeat and enthusiastic devotees of possibility thinking
optimistic.$description: Lead with what is possible. Forward-looking language. Acknowledge challenges then pivot to solutions.

analytical.$value: thoughtful, intelligent and deliberate in everything we do and say
analytical.$description: Back claims with specifics: specs, ratios, densities, benchmarks. Numbers over filler adjectives.

passionate.$value: spirited and energized by technology, excited to engage
passionate.$description: Show care through specificity. No combat metaphors. No punching at competitors.

genuine.$value: authentic, honest and straightforward, human and dynamic
genuine.$description: Write like a knowledgeable colleague. Plain language. Admit uncertainty when it exists. No hollow emotion.

avoid: It is our pleasure to announce

ambitious.$value: confident and determined, appreciative of the hard work
ambitious.$description: Name targets and back them. Pride in what is built. No arrogance or dismissiveness toward competitors.

prohibited_phrases.$description: Phrases that fail the brand-voice quality gate regardless of context.

com.solidigm.brand.source: Solidigm Brand Overview deck, slide 6 — Brand Tone and Voice. ©2026, Solidigm.
com.solidigm.brand.rationale: Encodes the five voice traits as machine-readable tokens so validate_brand_output and get_brand_context can enforce them programmatically. The prohibited_phrases list drives the tone_alignment quality gate check.
